parameters.query: SELECT id, slug, schema_name, s3_prefix, status FROM public.tenants WHERE slug = '{{ $json.tenant_slug }}' AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1;
UPDATE {{ $json.tenant.schema_name }}.sources SET status='indexed', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.source_id }}';

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, source_id: $json.source_id, chunk_count: $json.total_chunks, tenant: $json.tenant_slug }) }}
